context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct ElevenLabs REST API endpoint, authentication header, request format, and parameter conventions when making direct cURL calls for music generation.

checklist.name: Correct API endpoint
checklist.description: Uses POST https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/music as the endpoint URL

checklist.name: Correct auth header
checklist.description: Uses xi-api-key header (not Authorization: Bearer or other auth schemes) for authentication

checklist.name: API key from env var
checklist.description: Reads the API key from the ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable, does not hardcode a key

checklist.name: Content-Type header
checklist.description: Includes Content-Type: application/json header in the request

checklist.name: JSON request body
checklist.description: Sends a JSON body with 'prompt' field as a string

checklist.name: Duration in milliseconds
checklist.description: Converts the input seconds to milliseconds for the music_length_ms JSON field (multiplies by 1000)

checklist.name: Output to file
checklist.description: Uses --output or -o flag (or redirect) to save the response body to the specified MP3 file

checklist.name: POST method
checklist.description: Uses -X POST or equivalent to make a POST request

checklist.name: Duration bounds awareness
checklist.description: Script includes validation or a comment about the valid range of 3000-600000 ms for music_length_ms

checklist.name: Error code handling
checklist.description: Checks the cURL exit code or HTTP status code and exits with a non-zero code on failure
